title: ASR Outdoor 55pc Compact Travel First Aid Kit in Resealable Bag Camping Hiking
description:
The importance of emergency preparedness cannot be stressed enough, especially when you find yourself out in the elements, in remote locations or away from readily available medical help or first responders. While this kit might be small, it could save a life in the event of an emergency, or stop a minor injury from becoming a bigger, unmanageable one. The first aid kit comes with the following components: x8 pads; x4 sting relief wipes; x1 soap wipe; x12 small adhesive bandages (1-1/2 x 3/8 inches); x12 medium adhesive bandages (2-7/8 x ¾ inches); x12 large adhesive bandages (3 x 1 inch); x4 gauze pads (2pc per pack); x1 PBT Bandage (2 x 1-3/4 inches) Packed in a resealable bag, the first aid kit is portable and able to be refilled as needed

ASR Outdoor 55pc Compact Travel First Aid Kit in Resealable Bag Camping Hiking

The importance of emergency preparedness cannot be stressed enough, especially when you find yourself out in the elements, in remote locations or away from readily available medical help or first responders. While this kit might be small, it could save a life in the event of an emergency, or stop a minor injury from becoming a bigger, unmanageable one.

The first aid kit comes with the following components:

Key Features

  • 55PC FIRST AID KIT: First aid kit includes x8 pads; x4 sting relief wipes; x1 soap wipe; x12 small adhesive bandages; x12 medium adhesive bandages; x12 large adhesive bandages; x4 gauze pads; x1 PBT Bandage
  • POCKET SIZED AND PORTABLE: Compact, portable and lightweight, this first aid kit from ASR Outdoor is the perfect size to pack with your personal belongings when traveling, camping, hiking, backpacking, biking, skiing and more
  • CAR ACCESSORIES: The 55pc first aid kit is a great addition to any roadside emergency car kit or vehicle survival kit so you can handle minor stings, burns, scrapes and scratches when you’re on the go
  • REUSABLE BAG: Resealable bag means you can continue adding medical supplies and emergency preparedness items to this handy reuseable bag when existing supplies start to run low
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 6.5 x 4.75 x 2 inches; Weight: 0.10lbs

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 6NWRA86K
  • UPC: 810131702588
  • Color: White
  • Size: Small

x8 pads; x4 sting relief wipes; x1 soap wipe; x12 small adhesive bandages (1-1/2 x 3/8 inches); x12 medium adhesive bandages (2-7/8 x ¾ inches); x12 large adhesive bandages (3 x 1 inch); x4 gauze pads (2pc per pack); x1 PBT Bandage (2 x 1-3/4 inches)

Packed in a resealable bag, the first aid kit is portable and able to be refilled as needed. Compact and very lightweight, the first aid kit is easy to pack with your gear without any extra added weight or bulk for on the go readiness; ideal to keep with your personal belongings, especially when traveling, to keep in your car, or to pack for shorter outdoor excursions when you want to carry minimal amounts of gear.

Be ready and prepared to handle minor burns, scratches, scrapes or stings with this handy and easy to tote 55pc first aid kit from ASR Outdoor. Perfect to keep with your camping, backpacking, biking, skiing and hiking gear, or when traveling or road tripping.
